message:
test(db): add 19 retry.rs unit tests for circuit breaker, health status, jitter

Cover previously untested paths: remaining_open_secs across all circuit
states, record_success in Open state (defensive branch), CircuitState
Display, retry_sync blocked by open circuit breaker, health status JSON
serialization with skip_serializing_if, per-subsystem recommendation
strings, jitter_factor range validation [-1.0,1.0], delay_for_attempt
minimum 10ms floor, micros_from_duration saturation, retry_sync CB
failure recording and success reset.

Retry test count: 31 → 50. DB lib total: 571 → 590.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
